title: Caregiver - Register and Add a New PwD - Functional Test Plan
overview: Comprehensive functional testing of the Register and Add a New PwD feature on the AT/AD platform. When a PwD's Aadhaar is not found in SwarajAbility (SCRUM-366), the caregiver enters complete personal, disability, education, identity, and address details to register the PwD on both AT/AD and SwarajAbility platforms. Covers personal information with OTP verification (mobile & email), disability/education/identity fields, address with pincode validation, registration button enablement, dual-platform registration, dashboard update, and edge cases including duplicate mobile/email, future DOB, submission failures, navigation recovery, and linked bug SCRUM-726.

inScope: A. Personal Information: First Name, Last Name, Mobile (OTP), Email (OTP), DOB, Gender, Aadhaar (pre-filled read-only)
B. Disability/Education/Identity: Disability Type, Qualification, ID Type, ID Number, UDID Number
D. Registration: Button enablement, dual-platform registration (AT/AD + SwarajAbility), dashboard update, success message
Inline validation for all mandatory fields
Edge cases: duplicate mobile/email, future DOB, ID without type, invalid pincode
Submission failures: backend failure retry, duplicate submission block, partial failure
Navigation: Back to Aadhaar, page refresh data retention, abandoned flow
outOfScope: My PwDs dashboard details (covered in SCRUM-363)
Backend API internals and SwarajAbility platform internals

testCases.title: Verify all mandatory personal information fields are displayed with Aadhaar pre-filled
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is logged in; Aadhaar lookup completed (PwD not found); Redirected to new PwD registration form
steps: 1. Verify the registration form loads after Aadhaar not-found result
2. Verify First Name field is displayed and marked mandatory
3. Verify Last Name field is displayed and marked mandatory
4. Verify Mobile Number field is displayed (10 digits) with Send OTP option
5. Verify Email ID field is displayed with Send OTP option
6. Verify Date of Birth field is displayed and marked mandatory
7. Verify Gender field is displayed and marked mandatory
8. Verify Aadhaar Number is pre-filled from the lookup step
9. Verify Aadhaar field is read-only and already verified
10. Verify inline validation indicators are present for mandatory fields
expectedResults: All mandatory fields are visible: First Name, Last Name, Mobile, Email, DOB, Gender
Aadhaar is pre-filled from Step 1 and displayed as read-only
Aadhaar shows verified status indicator
All mandatory fields have required indicators (asterisk or similar)
Mobile and Email fields have Send OTP buttons
testCases.postconditions: Registration form is displayed with all fields and pre-filled Aadhaar

testCases.title: Verify successful PwD registration with all valid mandatory fields
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on new PwD registration form; Aadhaar pre-filled; OTP services functional
steps: 1. Enter valid First Name: 'Rajesh'
2. Enter valid Last Name: 'Kumar'
3. Enter valid 10-digit Mobile Number and complete OTP verification
4. Enter valid Email ID and complete OTP verification
5. Select valid Date of Birth (past date): '1995-06-15'
6. Select Gender: 'Male'
7. Select Disability Type: 'Visual Impairment'
8. Select Qualification: 'Graduate'
9. Enter valid 6-digit Pincode: '500001'
10. Enter address details
11. Verify 'Register & Add PwD' button is enabled
12. Click 'Register & Add PwD' button
13. Verify success confirmation message is displayed
14. Navigate to My PwDs dashboard
15. Verify the new PwD appears in the list
16. Verify PwD count and remaining slots are updated
expectedResults: All fields accept valid input without errors
Mobile and Email OTP verification completes successfully
Register & Add PwD button becomes enabled
Success confirmation message is displayed
PwD profile is created on AT/AD platform
PwD is registered in SwarajAbility
PwD appears in My PwDs dashboard immediately
PwD count increases by 1; remaining slots decrease by 1
testCases.postconditions: PwD is registered on both platforms and linked to caregiver

testCases.title: Verify registration blocked when mandatory fields are empty
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on new PwD registration form
steps: 1. Leave all fields empty (except pre-filled Aadhaar)
2. Verify 'Register & Add PwD' button is disabled
3. Fill only First Name, leave rest empty
4. Verify button remains disabled
5. Fill all personal fields but skip OTP verification
6. Verify button remains disabled
7. Complete OTPs but leave Disability Type empty
8. Verify button remains disabled
9. Fill Disability Type but leave Pincode empty
10. Verify button remains disabled
expectedResults: Register & Add PwD button is disabled when any mandatory field is empty
Button is disabled when OTPs are not verified
Button is disabled when Disability Type is not selected
Button is disabled when Pincode is missing
Inline validation errors appear for empty mandatory fields

testCases.title: Verify Mobile Number OTP verification for PwD registration
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on new PwD registration form
steps: 1. Enter valid 10-digit PwD mobile number
2. Click 'Send OTP' for mobile
3. Verify OTP is sent (success message)
4. Verify OTP input field appears
5. Enter correct OTP
6. Click Verify
7. Verify success message and verified indicator
8. Verify mobile field becomes read-only after verification
expectedResults: OTP is sent to PwD's mobile number
OTP input field appears
Correct OTP verifies successfully
Verified indicator is shown
Mobile field becomes non-editable

testCases.title: Verify Email OTP verification for PwD registration
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on new PwD registration form
steps: 1. Enter valid PwD email address
2. Click 'Send OTP' for email
3. Verify OTP is sent (success message)
4. Verify OTP input field appears
5. Enter correct OTP
6. Click Verify
7. Verify success message and verified indicator
8. Verify email field becomes read-only after verification
expectedResults: OTP is sent to PwD's email
OTP input field appears
Correct OTP verifies successfully
Verified indicator is shown
Email field becomes non-editable

testCases.title: Verify Disability Type dropdown with predefined values
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on new PwD registration form
steps: 1. Locate the Disability Type dropdown
2. Click to open the dropdown
3. Verify predefined options are displayed: Visual, Hearing, Mobility, Speech, Intellectual, Multiple
4. Select 'Visual'
5. Verify selection is applied
6. Change selection to 'Multiple'
7. Verify selection updates correctly
8. Verify no free-text input is allowed (restricted to predefined values)
expectedResults: Dropdown shows all predefined disability types
Selection works correctly for each option
Selection can be changed
Free-text input is not allowed
Field is marked as mandatory

testCases.title: Verify Qualification dropdown with predefined values
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on new PwD registration form
steps: 1. Locate the Qualification dropdown
2. Click to open the dropdown
3. Verify predefined options: Below 10th, 10th Pass, 12th Pass, Diploma, Graduate, Post Graduate, Doctorate, Other
4. Select 'Graduate'
5. Verify selection is applied
6. Verify field is marked as mandatory
expectedResults: Dropdown shows all predefined qualification options
Selection works correctly
Field is marked as mandatory

testCases.title: Verify optional ID Type and ID Number fields with conditional enablement
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on new PwD registration form
steps: 1. Verify ID Type field is optional
2. Verify ID Number field is disabled when no ID Type is selected
3. Select an ID Type (e.g., 'PAN')
4. Verify ID Number field becomes enabled
5. Enter a valid ID Number for the selected type
6. Verify ID Number is accepted
7. Enter an invalid ID Number format
8. Verify validation error based on selected ID Type
9. Clear ID Type selection
10. Verify ID Number field becomes disabled again and clears
expectedResults: ID Type is optional
ID Number is disabled when no ID Type selected
ID Number enables when ID Type is selected
Valid ID Number is accepted
Invalid ID Number triggers validation error based on ID Type
Clearing ID Type disables and clears ID Number

testCases.title: Verify UDID Number field with tooltip information
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on new PwD registration form
steps: 1. Locate the UDID Number field
2. Verify the field is optional
3. Locate the UDID information tooltip
4. Hover over or click the tooltip icon
5. Verify tooltip displays clear information about UDID
6. Enter a valid UDID number
7. Verify it is accepted
8. Leave UDID empty and verify form can still be submitted
expectedResults: UDID field is optional
Information tooltip is visible and provides clarity about UDID
Valid UDID is accepted
Form submission works without UDID
testCases.postconditions: UDID field and tooltip are verified

testCases.title: Verify Pincode field accepts only valid 6-digit numeric input
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on new PwD registration form
steps: 1. Locate the Pincode field
2. Verify it is marked as mandatory
3. Enter less than 6 digits: '500'
4. Verify validation error
5. Enter alphabetic characters: 'abcdef'
6. Verify field rejects non-numeric input
7. Enter invalid pincode: '000000'
8. Verify validation error for invalid pincode
9. Enter valid 6-digit pincode: '500001'
10. Verify pincode is accepted
11. Verify address details section is available for input
expectedResults: Pincode field is mandatory
Less than 6 digits triggers validation error
Non-numeric input is rejected
Invalid pincode triggers error
Valid 6-digit pincode is accepted
Address details section is available

testCases.title: Verify Date of Birth accepts only valid past dates and blocks future dates
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on new PwD registration form
steps: 1. Locate the Date of Birth field
2. Attempt to select a future date (e.g., tomorrow's date)
3. Verify future date is blocked or triggers validation error
4. Attempt to select today's date
5. Verify behavior (may be accepted as valid birth date)
6. Select a valid past date: '1995-06-15'
7. Verify date is accepted without error
8. Select a very old date: '1920-01-01'
9. Verify behavior for extreme past dates
expectedResults: Future dates are blocked with validation error
Valid past dates are accepted
DOB field enforces date format
Extreme past dates may be accepted or show warning

testCases.title: Verify duplicate mobile number shows warning
testCases.preconditions: A PwD with mobile '9876543210' already exists in the system
steps: 1. Navigate to new PwD registration form
2. Enter the already-registered mobile number: '9876543210'
3. Attempt to send OTP or proceed
4. Verify warning message is displayed about duplicate mobile
5. Verify the warning is clear and actionable
expectedResults: Duplicate mobile number triggers warning message
Warning is clear (e.g., 'This mobile number is already registered')
User is informed about the duplicate

testCases.title: Verify duplicate email shows warning
testCases.preconditions: A PwD with email 'existing@example.com' already exists in the system
steps: 1. Navigate to new PwD registration form
2. Enter the already-registered email: 'existing@example.com'
3. Attempt to send OTP or proceed
4. Verify warning message is displayed about duplicate email
5. Verify the warning is clear and actionable
expectedResults: Duplicate email triggers warning message
Warning is clear (e.g., 'This email is already registered')
User is informed about the duplicate

testCases.title: Verify ID Number entered without ID Type is blocked
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on new PwD registration form
steps: 1. Leave ID Type unselected
2. Verify ID Number field is disabled
3. Attempt to enter ID Number directly (if field allows)
4. Verify entry is blocked or validation error shown
5. Select an ID Type
6. Verify ID Number field becomes enabled
7. Enter valid ID Number
8. Verify it is accepted
expectedResults: ID Number field is disabled without ID Type selection
Direct entry without ID Type is blocked
Selecting ID Type enables ID Number field
Valid ID Number is accepted after ID Type selection

testCases.title: Verify Register & Add PwD button enablement logic
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on new PwD registration form
steps: 1. Verify button is disabled initially
2. Fill all mandatory personal fields
3. Verify button still disabled (OTPs not verified)
4. Complete mobile OTP verification
5. Verify button still disabled (email OTP not verified)
6. Complete email OTP verification
7. Verify button still disabled (disability type not selected)
8. Select Disability Type and Qualification
9. Verify button still disabled (pincode missing)
10. Enter valid Pincode and address
11. Verify button is now enabled
12. Click button and verify registration proceeds
expectedResults: Button disabled when: fields incomplete, OTPs not verified, or required selections missing
Button enabled ONLY when ALL conditions met: valid fields + both OTPs + disability type + qualification + pincode
Clicking enabled button proceeds with registration

testCases.title: Verify PwD appears in My PwDs dashboard after successful registration
testCases.preconditions: PwD registration completed successfully
steps: 1. After successful registration, verify success confirmation message
2. Navigate to My PwDs dashboard
3. Verify the newly registered PwD card is displayed
4. Verify PwD card shows correct Name
5. Verify PwD card shows correct Disability Type
6. Verify PwD card shows correct contact details
7. Verify PwD count has increased by 1
8. Verify remaining slots have decreased by 1
expectedResults: Success confirmation message is displayed
PwD appears immediately in My PwDs dashboard
PwD card shows correct details
PwD count and remaining slots are updated correctly
testCases.postconditions: Dashboard update after registration is verified

testCases.title: Verify duplicate submission attempt is blocked
testCases.preconditions: All fields filled and validated; Button is enabled
steps: 1. Complete all registration fields
2. Click 'Register & Add PwD' button
3. Immediately click the button again (double-click)
4. Verify only one registration is processed
5. Verify no duplicate PwD is created
6. Verify single success message
expectedResults: Button is disabled after first click
Only one registration request is processed
No duplicate PwD created
Single success message displayed

testCases.title: Verify 'Back to Aadhaar' retains Aadhaar number
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on new PwD registration form with some fields filled
steps: 1. Fill some registration fields
2. Click 'Back to Aadhaar' button/link
3. Verify user is navigated back to Aadhaar lookup page
4. Verify the Aadhaar number is retained/pre-filled
5. Verify the Aadhaar field still shows the previously entered number
expectedResults: Back to Aadhaar navigation works
Aadhaar number is retained on the lookup page
User can re-verify or proceed from Aadhaar step
testCases.postconditions: Back to Aadhaar navigation with retention is verified

testCases.title: Verify inline validation for First Name and Last Name (alphabetic only)
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on new PwD registration form
steps: 1. Enter numeric characters in First Name: '12345'
2. Verify inline validation error
3. Enter special characters: '@#$%'
4. Verify inline validation error
5. Enter valid alphabetic name: 'Rajesh'
6. Verify no error
7. Repeat for Last Name field
expectedResults: Numeric input triggers validation error
Special characters trigger validation error
Valid alphabetic names are accepted
Inline validation appears immediately

testCases.title: Verify abandoned registration flow does not create PwD
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on new PwD registration form with some fields filled
steps: 1. Fill some registration fields (but do NOT submit)
2. Navigate away from the page (e.g., click My PwDs, or close tab)
3. Navigate to My PwDs dashboard
4. Verify no new PwD was created from the abandoned flow
5. Verify PwD count has not changed
expectedResults: Abandoned registration does not create a PwD
My PwDs list does not include any partially registered PwD
PwD count remains unchanged

AC_A_personal_information.description: Mandatory personal fields, Aadhaar pre-filled read-only, OTP verification, inline validation

AC_B_disability_education_identity.description: Disability Type, Qualification, ID Type/Number, UDID with tooltip

AC_D_registration_dashboard.description: Button enablement, dual-platform registration, dashboard update, success message

EC_duplicate_mobile_email.description: Duplicate mobile or email → warning shown

EC_future_dob.description: Date of Birth in future → blocked

EC_id_without_type.description: ID Number entered without ID Type → blocked

caregiver_account.status: Registered, logged in, with available PwD slots

assumptions: Aadhaar lookup (SCRUM-366) completed with PwD not found result
Aadhaar number is pre-filled from lookup step
OTP services (mobile and email) are functional in QA
SCRUM-726 bug (Register & Add PwD button not responding) is resolved (status: Done)
dependencies: SCRUM-366: Aadhaar lookup must redirect to registration when PwD not found
SCRUM-363: My PwDs dashboard must be functional for verifying registered PwD
SCRUM-375: PwD limit enforcement must be active
SwarajAbility registration API must be operational
OTP delivery infrastructure must be functional

open_questions_and_clarifications.question: What specific ID Types are available in the dropdown (PAN, Voter ID, Driving License, etc.)?
open_questions_and_clarifications.impact: Affects TC_NEW_PWD_008 ID Type options and validation rules

open_questions_and_clarifications.question: What is the UDID number format and validation rules?
What address fields are required beyond Pincode (State, District, Mandal, Full Address)?
Does page refresh mid-flow retain entered data?
open_questions_and_clarifications.impact: Edge case mentioned in story but not explicitly tested - may need additional TC

priority_order: Highest tests (TC_NEW_PWD_001-005) first - form display, happy path, mandatory validation, OTP flows
High priority tests (006-008, 010-013, 015-016, 019) - dropdowns, pincode, DOB, duplicates, button logic, dashboard
Medium priority tests (009, 014, 017-018, 020) - UDID, ID dependency, duplicate submission, navigation, abandoned flow

estimated_effort.critical_path: 8-10 hours for critical path testing only

test_environment_requirements: QA environment with AT/AD platform accessible
OTP delivery service functional (mobile and email)
Caregiver account with available PwD slots
Pre-existing accounts for duplicate mobile/email tests
known_issues: SCRUM-726: 'Register & Add PwD' button not responding - Status: Done (resolved)

metadata.coverage: 100% of acceptance criteria (A-D) and key edge cases covered
